related to equipment completely independently.
01 = If someone else sets up equipment (i.e., fills portable oxygen tank, provides patient with prepared solutions), patient is able to manage all other aspects of equipment.
02 = Patient requires considerable assistance from another person to manage equipment, but independently completes portions of the task.
03 = Patient is only able to monitor equipment (e.g., liter flow, fluid in bag) and must call someone else to manage the equipment.
